## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm test` passes (tests added/updated where relevant)
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm build` succeeds
- [ ] User-facing strings use i18n keys (added to `i18n/locales/en.json` — never hardcoded)
- [ ] Docs updated (README, `docs/`, CHANGELOG) where behavior or conventions changed
- [ ] Commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or user data included
